goal: Create the minimal governed execute-step path with Builder, SENTRY, Historian, and TSOS under an isolated factory-v1 directory.

steps.title: Create SENTRY verifier
Create Historian receipt recorder
Create TSOS metrics recorder
Create Builder executeStep runtime
Create frozen-step runner
Create execute-step route
Create sample frozen step payload
non_goals: Do not create extra example payloads

steps.title: Create blueprint-owned acceptance registry for proof execution
non_goals: Do not accept caller-supplied acceptance tests
Do not add unrelated proof cases
